title: psammogeton involucratum
intro: Psammogeton involucratum, also known as Sandwort, is a perennial herb plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Psammogeton involucratum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Psammogeton involucratum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
